column1: # ROW([reference]) — reference-arg: with an argument returns the 1-based row of
# the reference's top-left; with no argument the row of the cell holding the
# formula. The setup '@Cell' token declares where the formula lives (so the
# no-arg cases are deterministic for the end-to-end runner). T0 returns one
# number (the multi-row array form is a T1 spill concern).
